data.title: Everfox, a cybersecurity company, appoints Dave Wajsgras as Chairman and CEO in Herndon, VA - new leadership change.
data.description: Everfox, a reputable cybersecurity company based in Herndon, Virginia, revealed the hiring of Dave Wajsgras as the new Chairman and Chief Executive Officer.

data.title: Bakkt's shares jump 20% on stablecoin payments shift, with stock deal potentially valued at $178M.
data.description: Following the recent announcement, Bakkt's stock has experienced a significant increase in share price, potentially reaching a value of approximately $178 million in a stock deal.

data.title: Steel Dynamics (NASDAQ: STLD) will release Q4 and full year 2025 financial results before market opens in January 2026.
data.description: Fort Wayne, Indiana - On January 12, 2026, Steel Dynamics, Inc. (STLD), a leading domestic steel producer and metals recycler in North America, revealed plans to unveil its financial results for the Fourth Quarter and Full Year of 2025 before the market opens. STLD is listed on the NASDAQ/GS and is known for being one of the largest players in the steel industry. Stay tuned for detailed insights on the company's performance in the past year.
US Regulators: Credit risk for big bank loans still moderate.

data.title: Investor rights law firm Halper Sadeh LLC urges VTYX, FONR, SNCY, FFIC shareholders to discuss their rights regarding potential violations. Contact for more information.
data.description: Investors are advised to reach out to the firm promptly as there is a time constraint to assert their rights. On January 12, 2026, in New York, Halper Sadeh LLC, a law firm specializing in investor rights, is looking into various companies for potential infringements of federal securities laws and/or breaches. It is important for shareholders to take action quickly in such situations.

data.title: General Dynamics to webcast Q4 and full-year financial results conference call on Jan. 28th, 2025 at 9am EST. More info at www.gd.com.
data.description: General Dynamics, a company listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol GD, has announced that it will be hosting a live webcast of its Q4 and full-year financial results conference call on January 28, 2026, at 9 a.m. EST. The webcast can be accessed at www.gd.com. For those unable to tune in live, a replay of the conference call will be available afterwards.

data.title: Research report on Latin America Digital Commerce & Payments in the Age of AI for 2026. Covers 7 countries.
data.description: A recent report titled "Latin America Digital Commerce & Payments in the Age of AI, 2026" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. The report delves into the impact of digital commerce, changing payment systems, and artificial intelligence on the retail and financial sectors in Latin America. It offers a comprehensive analysis of market growth, transactional infrastructure, consumer trends, and corporate adaptations in key countries such as Brazil, Mexico, Argentina, and Colombia. This report provides valuable insights into the future of commerce and payments in the region.

data.title: FORTÉ promotes Zach Valigura, Kendra Apelt, and Chris Clark to bolster business ops in Minneapolis.
data.description: Forté, based in Minneapolis, recently announced the promotion of three key leaders to enhance its business operations. Zach Valigura, Kendra Apelt, and Chris Clark have been promoted to take on more responsibilities within the company. This move is aimed at further solidifying Forté's position in the market and driving growth.
Agencies issue 2025 Shared National Credit Program report

data.title: Governor and officials announce $10 million grant for affordable housing in Delaware with FHLBank Pittsburgh.
data.description: In Wilmington, Delaware, the Governor and federal delegation are partnering with FHLBank Pittsburgh to reveal the allocation of almost $10 million in grants through the 2025 Affordable Housing Program within the state.

data.title: Adimab had a successful 2025 with 23 partnerships, 75 new programs, 50 milestones, and over 650 therapeutic programs to date.
data.description: In 2025, Adimab, LLC, based in Lebanon, N.H., established 23 new partnerships, added 75 new programs, achieved 50 milestones, and has collectively developed over 650 therapeutic programs so far. This global leader in discovery and engineering continues to expand its reach and impact in the industry.
Barbasol and Westwood One mark 20 years sponsoring NFL games on Westwood One.

data.title: RxAnte gets strategic growth investment from Primus Capital, to accelerate pharmacy care management efforts.
data.description: In Portland, Maine on January 12, 2026, RxAnte, a prominent company specializing in analytics, software, and services for pharmacy care management, revealed a major strategic growth investment from Primus Capital. This collaboration aims to propel RxAnte's initiatives forward and facilitate its expansion.

data.title: Dow rises, Nasdaq strong; Nvidia, Tesla gain. Nuclear stock surges; Biotech firm continues sell-off.
data.description: The Nasdaq composite index demonstrates its strong performance in the stock market. One nuclear energy stock surges significantly, while leading companies Nvidia and Tesla also contribute to overall gains. Today in the stock market, the Dow Jones index is positive due to Nvidia's continued increase. Additionally, a biotech firm is experiencing a decline in sales, as per live coverage of the market provided by a popular financial news source.

data.title: CloseMate introduces Fully Autonomous CRM powered by AGI-grade logic, shifting from SaaS to Service as Software. Early access opens Jan. 12, 2026.
data.description: On January 12, 2026, in Hawthorne, California, CloseMate launched early access to the first Fully Autonomous CRM globally. This CRM is powered by AGI-grade logic, marking a transition from Software as a Service to Service as Software. This innovative approach entails buying assured outcomes rather than traditional software offerings.

data.title: Vitalik Buterin urges Ethereum to ready for quantum computing threat, aiming for long-term function without frequent upgrades.
data.description: Vitalik Buterin, one of the founders of Ethereum, believes that the network should be designed to operate smoothly for numerous decades without needing frequent updates. This includes the ability to withstand potential threats from quantum computers in the future.

data.title: USV market forecast to grow from $600 million in 2025 to $2.6 billion in 2033. Navies shifting to multi-mission assets.
data.description: In Dublin, a report titled "Unmanned Surface Vehicles (USV) for Defence and Security - Market and Technology Forecast to 2033" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's collection. The report highlights a shift in the USV sector from experimental models to versatile assets integrated into naval frameworks, predicting a move from single-function USVs to interconnected system-of-systems configurations. This evolution sees USVs operating as cooperative components within broader naval systems.

data.title: WHOOP forms the Massachusetts AI Coalition to advance AI innovation in the state, uniting leading companies and investors.
data.description: In Boston, WHOOP, a human performance company, revealed the establishment of the Massachusetts AI Coalition. This coalition comprises prominent technology, manufacturing, healthcare, consumer, and industrial firms and investors located or heavily active across the Commonwealth. The initiative is unique, being led by companies, and aims to enhance cooperation, speed up practical AI integration, and solidify Massachusetts' position as a worldwide artificial intelligence pioneer.
